texto: Recently, I was preparing to sing Springsteen's 'If I Should Fall Behind' for a wedding and was unable to get through it without tears. My wife handed me 'Love You Forever.' I read it. I cried. But that cry somehow cured me of crying while singing the song. Go figure.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Clyde Edgerton sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “Recently, I was preparing to sing Springsteen's 'If I Should Fall Behind' for a wedding and was u…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amor, love, wife, útil em momentos de casamento e wife.

texto: A parentologist is a person who writes a book about parenting that is very clear about answers to, 'How am I supposed to raise my child?' Some of these well-intentioned people may be a bit too sure-footed on the sometimes slippery slope of parenting.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Clyde Edgerton que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “A parentologist is a person who writes a book about parenting that is very clear about answers to…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre familia, book, child, com foco em child e people.

texto: A working definition of fathering might be this: fathering is the act of guiding a child to behave in ways that lead to the child's becoming a secure child in full, thus increasing his or her chances of being happy and fruitful as a young adult.

texto: Because we men have been physically stronger and more arrogant, we've influenced much of the cool stuff of the world, like basing the definition of courage on what we do on battlefields rather than on the patience or endurance or tolerance necessary for a sometimes painful daily grind that includes small children.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Clyde Edgerton: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Because we men have been physically stronger and more arrogant, we've influenced much of the cool…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que coragem, children, daily pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e coragem.
